list.title: Edstore
list.description: Story-based mobile learning app optimized for fast, on-the-go content

hero.title: Edstore
hero.description: Story-based mobile learning app optimized for fast, on-the-go content

meta.role: Led design team, art direction, product strategy, and core concepts
meta.scope: Discovery → Core App Flows → Market Research → Brand Guidelines → Value-added Flows → Launch

paragraphs.text: Early app concepts were based on the team’s previous experiment with a fully featured web platform, but that approach failed. When I joined the team, we shifted the focus to mobile and aimed to make lesson creation easier.

After ideating around multiple content types and extensively testing the mobile editor, we made a difficult decision to remove it from the app entirely. It may sound counterintuitive, but after 20+ interviews and a survey of 500+ early users, we found that our first audience was not early-stage authors, but experienced experts working with content creation teams.
To fit their needs, I designed the app around a social media-friendly format. I also created content guidelines so users could create not only video lessons, but also text-based content.
